title: tragacantha macrochlamys
intro: Tragacantha macrochlamys, also known as the horse thistle or scabious, is a flowering plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and providing relief from respiratory issues. Tragacantha macrochlamys can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular natural remedy in folk medicine.
